description: Packagist.org is the main public package repository for Composer, the PHP dependency manager. It indexes public PHP packages and provides metadata used to discover, install, and track packages.
summary: Packagist.org exposes a documented HTTP API on packagist.org for package listing, search, package metadata, stats, advisories, and package-management operations; public read endpoints are documented, while write-operation authentication is referenced but not fully specified in the scraped docs.
